text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... it felt like I wasn't harnessing my qi
properly in today's race. Perhaps I wasn't
prepared enough or something?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have to get stronger so I can fully unleash the
power of feng shui!
choice_data_list: Your determination to improve is impressive!
Your determination to improve is impressive!

All right, I won't hold anything back during
training!

All right, I won't hold anything back during
training!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, is that so? You're good at dishing out
praise, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Receiving praise is a huge mood booster. You're
putting feng shui into communication!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And you're doing it so effortlessly! No surprise
there, though!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, it feels like my luck has taken a
turn for the better! Let's get started with our
strategy session! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave the plans completely in your hands, so
don't let me down, okay? ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We're the perfect duo! With your training
methods and my feng shui, our happiness will
grow in leaps and bounds!
